===================
===================
=== bd2000-06-25-Reno.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 6/25/00, Reno Hilton Amphitheatre, Reno, NV, 2CDR

Taper: Unidentified.
Source: audio disks (likely low generational source) > (dBpowerAMP set to compression level 6) flac.

Note: LB lists just one recording for this date -- LB-46. I do not have LB-46 and thus do not know whether the present file
set derives from the same master (the only specific attribute mentioned for LB-46 is the rumbling caused by wind; this rumbiing is
certainly present of this recording as well, but that does not prove much). I do not think this date has been torrented to any great extent, but of course I might be wrong :). It's not unknown.

Disk One

1. Somebody Touched Me (acoustic) 2. Long Black Veil (acoustic)(Larry on mandolin) 3. Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on Dobro) 4. Girl Of The North Country (acoustic) 5. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) 6. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 7. Country Pie /Gotta Serve Somebody 8. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 9. I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met) 10. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 11. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat, 12. Things Have Changed 

Disk Two
1. Like A Rolling Stone 2. The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic) 3. Rainy Day Women #12 & #35
